title: Features — WebNami
description: Everything WebNami offers: a developer-friendly flat-file CMS with a built-in admin dashboard, Markdown editor, SEO tools, image handling, and full theme customization.

hero.heading: Everything your blog needs
hero.subheading: A complete blogging platform built on plain files, static output, and zero lock-in.

sections.label: Developer Friendly
sections.heading: Built the way developers expect
sections.subheading: Markdown files, a Git-friendly structure, and static output you can deploy anywhere.

items.heading: Markdown-first workflow
items.body: Every post and page is a plain Markdown file with YAML frontmatter. Edit in any text editor or through the admin.

items.heading: Works with your repository
items.body: Content lives in your project directory. Commit, diff, branch, and roll back with standard Git workflows.

items.heading: No database
items.body: No MySQL, no PostgreSQL, no migrations. Content is just files — nothing to maintain, back up, or corrupt.

items.heading: Deploy anywhere
items.body: Static HTML output works on any host — Netlify, Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, S3, or a plain VPS.

sections.label: Admin Dashboard
sections.heading: A clean browser UI for everything
sections.subheading: Manage your entire blog without touching the filesystem.

items.heading: Posts & Pages
items.body: Create, edit, publish, and delete posts and pages from a clean interface. Draft support included.

items.heading: Categories & Tags
items.body: Organise content with categories and comma-separated tags. Filter and browse by any combination.

items.heading: Site settings
items.body: Update your site name, description, social links, theme, and colour palette from a single settings screen.

items.heading: Markdown editor
items.body: A full-featured Markdown editor (powered by EasyMDE) with toolbar, live preview, drag-and-drop image upload, and clipboard paste.

sections.label: Customization
sections.heading: Make it yours
sections.subheading: Eight built-in colour palettes, swappable themes, and first-class dark mode.

items.heading: 8 colour palettes
items.body: Default, Forest, Ink, Ocean, Plum, Rose, Slate, and Sunset — switchable from the settings screen instantly.

items.heading: Theme system
items.body: Themes live in the themes/ directory as Nunjucks templates. Swap or build your own without touching core code.

items.heading: Dark / Light mode
items.body: Every built-in theme ships with a dark and light variant. Readers can toggle or it follows system preference.

sections.label: Performance
sections.heading: Fast by default
sections.subheading: Static HTML with optimised CSS and no client-side framework weight.

items.heading: Static HTML output
items.body: Eleventy compiles everything to plain HTML files. No server rendering, no runtime overhead.

items.heading: No client-side framework
items.body: Zero React, Vue, or Angular shipped to visitors. Pages load immediately on any device or connection.

items.heading: Tailwind CSS v4
items.body: Only the CSS classes actually used in your templates are shipped. No dead code, no bloat.

items.heading: Automatic asset optimisation
items.body: CSS and JS are bundled and minified on every production build via Vite. Assets are cache-busted automatically.

sections.label: Image Handling
sections.heading: Images without the hassle
sections.subheading: Upload, optimise, and serve responsive images — all handled for you.

items.heading: Upload from the editor
items.body: Drag-and-drop or paste images directly into the Markdown editor. They are saved alongside the post's content files.

items.heading: Automatic responsive images
items.body: Every image is resized to 360, 720, and 1080 px variants and served via a srcset for the right device.

items.heading: WebP conversion
items.body: All uploaded images are automatically converted to WebP for smaller file sizes and faster load times.

sections.label: SEO Ready
sections.heading: Built-in SEO, out of the box
sections.subheading: Everything search engines and social platforms expect — no plugins required.

items.heading: Meta tags
items.body: Title, description, and canonical URL are generated automatically from each post's frontmatter.

items.heading: OpenGraph & Twitter cards
items.body: Rich previews on every major social platform. OG image is auto-generated from your site name.

items.heading: JSON-LD schema
items.body: BlogPosting structured data is injected on every post so search engines understand your content fully.

items.heading: Sitemap & RSS
items.body: A sitemap.xml and RSS feed are generated on every build, along with robots.txt and a custom 404 page.

sections.label: Content Organisation
sections.heading: Keep your content organised
sections.subheading: Tags, categories, and pagination built in from day one.

items.heading: Tag & category filtering
items.body: Readers can browse posts by tag or category. Filtered views are statically generated — no query strings needed.

items.heading: Paginated post listing
items.body: Post lists are automatically split into pages based on your configured posts-per-page setting.
